name: IdsEdwGrpSrvyRspnDSetCur

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.AB_TMP_IdsEdwGrpSrvyRspnDSetCur;WITH cte_main AS (SELECT DISTINCT GSD.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_SK,GSD.SRC_SYS_CD,GSD.GRP_ID,GSD.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_DTM,GSD.SRVY_2_DGT_YR,GSD.SRVY_TYP_CD,GSD.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,GSD.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,GSD.GRP_SK,GSD.GRP_ATCHMT_ID,GSD.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_GRP_SIZE_NO,GSD.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_SRVY_TYP_NM,GSD.LAST_SRVY_RSPN_IN,GSD.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,GSD.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,GSD.GRP_ATCHMT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D GSD WHERE GSD.SRVY_2_DGT_YR=(SELECT MAX(GSD2.SRVY_2_DGT_YR) FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D GSD2 WHERE GSD.GRP_ID=GSD2.GRP_ID)),cte_ref AS (SELECT DISTINCT GSD2.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_SK,GSD2.SRC_SYS_CD,GSD2.GRP_ID,GSD2.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_DTM,GSD2.SRVY_2_DGT_YR,GSD2.SRVY_TYP_CD,GSD2.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,GSD2.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,GSD2.GRP_SK,GSD2.GRP_ATCHMT_ID,GSD2.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_GRP_SIZE_NO,GSD2.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_SRVY_TYP_NM,GSD2.LAST_SRVY_RSPN_IN,GSD2.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,GSD2.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,GSD2.GRP_ATCHMT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D GSD2 WHERE GSD2.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_DTM=(SELECT MAX(GSD3.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_DTM) FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D GSD3 WHERE GSD3.GRP_ID=GSD2.GRP_ID AND GSD3.SRC_SYS_CD=GSD2.SRC_SYS_CD AND GSD3.SRVY_2_DGT_YR=GSD2.SRVY_2_DGT_YR)) SELECT ref.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_SK AS GRP_SRVY_RSPN_SK,ref.SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD,ref.GRP_ID AS GRP_ID,ref.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_DTM AS GRP_SRVY_RSPN_DTM,ref.SRVY_2_DGT_YR AS SRVY_2_DGT_YR,ref.SRVY_TYP_CD AS SRVY_TYP_CD,'@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,ref.GRP_SK AS GRP_SK,ref.GRP_ATCHMT_ID AS GRP_ATCHMT_ID,ref.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_GRP_SIZE_NO AS GRP_SRVY_RSPN_GRP_SIZE_NO,ref.GRP_SRVY_RSPN_SRVY_TYP_NM AS GRP_SRVY_RSPN_SRVY_TYP_NM,'Y' AS LAST_SRVY_RSPN_IN,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,ref.GRP_ATCHMT_SK AS GRP_ATCHMT_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.AB_TMP_IdsEdwGrpSrvyRspnDSetCur FROM cte_main main LEFT JOIN cte_ref ref ON main.SRC_SYS_CD=ref.SRC_SYS_CD AND main.GRP_ID=ref.GRP_ID AND main.SRVY_2_DGT_YR=ref.SRVY_2_DGT_YR WHERE ref.GRP_ATCHMT_SK IS NOT NULL AND ref.GRP_ATCHMT_SK<>0 AND ref.GRP_ATCHMT_SK<>1

Description:
JOB NAME:     EdwGrpSrvySetCur

DESCRIPTION:  
  Sets the Last Survey Response Indicator for the GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D table.

      

INPUTS:
	                        
                EDW: GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D   
                        
  
HASH FILES:
             none
                

TRANSFORMS:  
                 none
                 
                           
PROCESSING:
                  Pull the records with the latest survey year for each group - then, select the last updated record within the group.  Set the LAST_SRVY_RSPN_IN to "Y" for this record.     
  

OUTPUTS: 
                  GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D.dat ready to load to EDW

MODIFICATIONS:

Developer                Date                 Project/Altiris #      Change Description                                                                     Development Project      Code Reviewer          Date Reviewed  
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Steph Goddard       08/17/2005                                     Original program


Pooja Sunkara         07/16/2013        5114                   Converted job from server to parallel version.                              EnterpriseWrhsDevl

Annotations:
Read data from table GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D. Get max SRVY_2_DGT_YR
Set the LAST_SRVY_RSPN_IN in GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D.
Write GRP_SRVY_RSPN_D Data into a Sequential file for  Load Update Job.
First, find the highest survey year - the first two positions of the GRP_ATCHMT_ID.  Then, find the latest update date within those records.  That is the current record.  Set the indicator to \"Y\" on this record.
End of IDS Group Survey Set Current
IDS Group Survey Set Current
Get max GRP_SRVY_RSPN_DTM
Job name:
IdsEdwGrpSrvyRspnDSetCur
